name: Does Google Assistant optimization matter more for local businesses in Los Angeles or San Diego?
description: Yes, especially for local businesses. Accurate city-level pages and a complete Google Business Profile help Google match nearby voice searches more reliably.

mainEntity.name: Does Google Assistant optimization matter more for local businesses in Los Angeles or San Diego?

acceptedAnswer.text: For businesses in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, and Salt Lake City, location accuracy matters because voice queries often include nearby intent like “near me” or city names. A fully completed Google Business Profile and location-specific pages help Google match those requests correctly.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, especially for local businesses. Accurate city-level pages and a complete Google Business Profile help Google match nearby voice searches more reliably.
